project_area: Food security initiatives, including expansion of agriculture & seafood production, local & regional mid-supply chain expansion, food access & availability, and emergency preparedness & resilience
demographic_requirements: Applicants must contribute to the local food system and have been in operation for at least 3 years.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include Massachusetts farmers, fishers, food system entities, and public and Tribal entities. Projects must align with one of four project types and involve capital improvements such as season extension equipment, cold storage, distribution expansion, or value-added processing equipment.
